prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Skyactiv-G 2.5L (PY-VPS)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (hybrid 60mm compressor wheel, 56mm turbine) running 22psi on E85, paired with a **PRL Motorsports Stage 3 intake manifold** and **ID1000x injectors** for 350whp on a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with flex-fuel tuning.

Full **CorkSport Motorsport-spec turbo kit** including a **custom 3-inch downpipe** with **Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter**, **Mishimoto X-line intercooler**, and **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** for consistent E85 delivery under lateral G-forces.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (CX-3-specific valving), **Cusco 22mm front sway bar**, **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit)**, and **Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms** for neutral handling, paired with **Bridgestone Potenza RE-71RS 225/40R18 tires** on **Enkei PF07 18x8.5 ET40 wheels**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (CX-3-specific, 30mm flares per side) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **Maxton Design GT-style rear diffuser**, painted in **Mazda Soul Red Crystal with matte black accents**.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (CX-3-specific, 3.5kg weight reduction) with **custom dual 40mm venting channels** for intercooler airflow, paired with **Vland LED sequential taillights** and **Morimoto XB LED headlights** with **RGB halo DRLs**.

**Custom interior roll cage** (Mazdaspeed6-derived, 6-point bolt-in) wrapped in **Nappa leather with Alcantara suede inserts**, **Sparco Pro ADV seats (CX-3-specific mounts)**, and **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** with **NRG quick-release hub**.
